terms.definition: A condition that makes it harder for a person to do certain activities or interact with the world around them. A disability can affect movement, sight, hearing, or learning.
terms.exampleUsage: Chuskit has a disability that means she uses a wheelchair, but she is just as smart as any other child.

terms.definition: Making sure that everyone, including people with disabilities, is welcomed and can take part in activities like school, play, and community life.
terms.exampleUsage: Our school practises inclusion by making sure all children can join in every activity.

terms.definition: A chair with wheels that helps people who cannot walk to move from place to place. It can be pushed by hand or powered by a motor.
terms.exampleUsage: Chuskit uses a wheelchair to move around because her legs cannot support her.

terms.definition: Designed so that everyone, including people with disabilities, can use it easily. An accessible building has ramps, wide doors, and lifts.
terms.exampleUsage: The new school building is accessible because it has a ramp beside the stairs.

terms.definition: A region in the northernmost part of India, known for its high mountains, cold desert landscape, Buddhist monasteries, and unique culture.
terms.exampleUsage: Ladakh is surrounded by the Himalaya and Karakoram mountain ranges.

terms.definition: A sloping surface that connects a lower level to a higher level. Ramps help people using wheelchairs, walking aids, or prams to enter buildings.
terms.exampleUsage: The villagers built a ramp so that Chuskit could enter the school.

terms.definition: The ability to understand and share the feelings of another person. Empathy helps us be kind and helpful to people who face difficulties.
terms.exampleUsage: The children showed empathy by helping Chuskit feel welcome in class.

terms.definition: A law in India that says every child between 6 and 14 years of age must get free education. This includes children with disabilities.
terms.exampleUsage: The Right to Education Act ensures that Chuskit can go to school just like all other children.

terms.definition: The physical features of an area of land, such as mountains, valleys, flat ground, or rocky paths.
terms.exampleUsage: The rough terrain of Ladakh makes it very hard for a wheelchair to move.

terms.definition: A group of people who live in the same area and help each other. A strong community supports all its members, including those with disabilities.
terms.exampleUsage: The whole community came together to build a path so Chuskit could reach school.
